de-h-armee-16.notes: Identity scaffold for the Eastern Front sector simulation; positions derive from authored army sectors (no divisional OOB yet — SCALE_PLAN S2).

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014
